EmailTemplate.description: Email to be used when renewals team have been unable to speak with a FUL scheme customer at the third attempt stage.
EmailTemplate.name: Unable to reach - Add-on comms FUL
EmailTemplate.subject: Want to add more coverage to your renewal quote?
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
I’ve been struggling to reach you to discuss your renewal quote.
To make sure your renewal quote includes all the coverage you need, are you interested in adding more coverage to your renewal policy?
- Cyber Liability - Covers your business from risks related to your technology and IT infrastructure. - IR35 Protect - Protects limited company contractors from the potentially crippling costs that can follow an IR35 enquiry. - Legal Expenses - Protects your business in the event of legal action.
Want to add any of these to your renewal quote? Let me know the best date and time for me to call you. Alternatively, you can give me a ring on 01242 808 740.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Sales Team
E: salesteam@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808740
